features.name: Verify Browser Agent End-to-End
features.description: 3-stage verification: (1) health check, (2) /diagnose navigates to codespace URL + screenshot, (3) direct URL reachability. Run: python3 tests/integration/test_browser_agent.py
features.completion_notes: All 3 stages passed: health check (v2.2.1), browser navigation via /diagnose, direct URL reachability. Screenshot: https://litter.catbox.moe/dr78gf.png
